contents.value:
## `--source`

Names the source of the data that populates the partition. The most common value is `rootfs`, but you can use any value that maps to a valid source plugin.

- `--source rootfs`: Wic creates a partition as large as needed and fills it with the contents of the root filesystem.
- `--source plugin-name`: Wic creates a partition as large as needed and fills it with the contents generated by the specified plugin.
- If omitted: Wic creates an empty partition. You must then also use `--size`.
